title: NHRC Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Consultant Posts
description: The National Human Rights Commission (NHRC) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Junior Research Consultant Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Post-graduation, Ph.D., and LLB can apply for the NHRC Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selecti...
